name: quick-review
description: Rapid code review checklist for quick feedback
---

# Quick Code Review

Review code quickly for major issues:

- [] Bare except clauses
- [] Missing type hints
- [] Unclear variable names

## Output Format
Provide results as:
- ✅ PASS: Items that look good
- ⚠️ WARN: Items that could be improved
- ❌ FAIL: Items that must be fixed before merge
